projectOverview.cleanDescription: Development of a user-friendly and efficient online platform to facilitate the reservation and scheduling of various services or resources. The system will enable customers to easily discover, book, view, and manage their appointments, while providing administrators with comprehensive tools to oversee service offerings, manage availability, and monitor all bookings.
projectOverview.businessGoal: To streamline the booking process for customers and service providers, significantly reduce manual administrative effort, improve operational efficiency, and enhance overall customer satisfaction by offering a convenient and reliable self-service scheduling platform.

objectives: To provide a seamless, intuitive, and efficient booking experience for all users, regardless of technical proficiency.
To minimize manual intervention in the scheduling process, thereby reducing administrative overhead and potential errors.
To ensure accurate and real-time availability information for all listed services and resources.
To enable effective management of services, booking rules, and user accounts by authorized administrators.
To enhance customer satisfaction by offering a convenient self-service platform for booking and managing appointments.

stakeholders.description: Individuals who wish to browse, book, view, and manage their reservations for services or resources.
Individuals or entities offering the services or resources, responsible for fulfilling bookings and managing their availability.
Users responsible for configuring system settings, managing service offerings, overseeing all bookings, and managing user accounts.
The client who commissioned the system, focused on overall business objectives, return on investment, and operational efficiency.

functionalRequirements.title: User Account Management
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow new users to register for an account using their email address and a password, and allow existing registered users to securely log in. It shall also provide a mechanism for password recovery.
acceptance_criteria: A user shall be able to register for a new account using a unique email address and a strong password.
A registered user shall be able to log in successfully using their credentials.
The system shall provide a 'Forgot Password' functionality that allows users to reset their password via email.
The system shall prevent unauthorized access to user accounts.

functionalRequirements.title: Service/Resource Discovery and Search
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall enable users to browse a catalog of available services or resources. Users shall be able to search and filter these offerings based on criteria such as service type, date, time, and keywords.
acceptance_criteria: Users shall be able to view a comprehensive list of all available services/resources.
Users shall be able to filter services by predefined categories or types.
Users shall be able to search for services by entering keywords (e.g., service name, description).
The system shall display the availability of each service/resource based on selected criteria.

functionalRequirements.title: Booking Creation
functionalRequirements.description: Authenticated users shall be able to select an available time slot for a chosen service or resource, provide necessary booking details, and confirm the reservation. The system shall provide immediate confirmation upon successful booking.
acceptance_criteria: A user shall be able to select an available date and time slot from a calendar view for a chosen service.
The system shall display a summary of the booking details (service, date, time, price, user info) before final confirmation.
Upon successful booking, the system shall provide an immediate on-screen confirmation message to the user.
The selected time slot shall be marked as unavailable to prevent double-bookings.

functionalRequirements.title: Booking Management (User)
functionalRequirements.description: Authenticated users shall be able to view a list of their upcoming and past bookings. They shall also have the option to cancel or reschedule their upcoming bookings, subject to predefined business rules (e.g., cancellation policy).
acceptance_criteria: A user shall be able to view a dashboard listing all their current and past bookings.
A user shall be able to cancel an upcoming booking before a defined cut-off time.
A user shall be able to reschedule an upcoming booking to a different available slot before a defined cut-off time.
The system shall display clear information regarding cancellation and rescheduling policies.

functionalRequirements.title: Service & Availability Configuration (Admin)
functionalRequirements.description: Administrators shall be able to add new services, modify existing service details (name, description, duration, pricing), and manage the availability calendar for each service, including defining working hours and blocking specific time slots.
acceptance_criteria: An administrator shall be able to create, edit, and delete service entries with associated details (e.g., name, description, duration, default price).
An administrator shall be able to define the daily/weekly available hours for each service.
An administrator shall be able to manually block specific dates or time slots to indicate unavailability.
Changes made by an administrator shall be reflected in the public booking interface immediately.

functionalRequirements.title: Automated Booking Notifications
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall send automated email notifications to relevant parties (customer, service provider, administrator) for key booking events such as confirmation, reminders, cancellations, and rescheduling.
acceptance_criteria: Customers shall receive an email confirmation immediately after a successful booking.
Customers shall receive an email reminder a configurable period (e.g., 24 hours) before their upcoming booking.
Service providers and/or administrators shall receive email notifications for new bookings and cancellations.
All notification emails shall contain essential booking details.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: User Interface Usability
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system's user interface shall be intuitive and easy to navigate, requiring minimal training for a new user to complete a booking within 3 clicks from the service discovery page. All critical functions should be easily discoverable.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: System Response Time
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall load all primary pages (e.g., service listing, booking calendar) and complete booking transactions within 3 seconds under normal load conditions (up to 100 concurrent users).

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Data Security and Privacy
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: All sensitive user data, including personal information and booking details, shall be encrypted both in transit (using TLS/SSL) and at rest. User authentication shall follow industry best practices, including strong password policies.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: System Availability
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall maintain an uptime of 99.5% excluding scheduled maintenance windows, ensuring services are consistently accessible to users.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Scalability for Concurrent Users
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall be designed to support up to 500 concurrent users performing booking-related actions without significant degradation in performance or user experience.

assumptions: Users will have access to a stable internet connection and a compatible web browser to interact with the system.
The client will provide a definitive, structured list of initial services/resources, their durations, and pricing models.
A third-party email service provider will be available and configured for sending automated notifications.
Services are booked on a time-slot basis; complex resource allocation (e.g., multiple staff per booking) is out of scope for a 'simple' system.
The system will initially cater to a single business entity, managing its services and resources.
constraints: The initial development phase will not include integration with external payment gateways; all bookings are assumed to be 'pending' or 'paid offline'.
The system will initially support only a single currency for service pricing.
The initial deployment will target web browsers only, with no dedicated native mobile application.
The project has a strict budget and timeline, necessitating a focus on core booking functionality first.
The system will integrate with existing business branding guidelines and potentially a pre-selected hosting environment.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 90% of test users successfully complete a full booking process (discovery to confirmation) within 5 minutes on their first attempt, with no assistance.
The system effectively reduces manual booking inquiries and administrative tasks by at least 70% within the first three months of live operation.
User feedback surveys indicate an average satisfaction score of 4 out of 5 stars or higher regarding the system's ease of use and reliability post-launch.
All core functional requirements are successfully tested and verified against their acceptance criteria.
